sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current magenta square positions
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current magenta squares:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"  M at {n['boundary'][0]}")

# Also check for any other notable objects
print("\nAll objects:")
for n in nodes:
    print(f"  {n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
